about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Leading Medical Coding in the Kingdom
about.description: DigiMind is a Saudi company specializing in medical coding and revenue cycle management solutions for healthcare facilities in Saudi Arabia. We drive healthcare digital transformation through our expertise in ICD-10, PLICS, and health information systems.
about.mission: To elevate medical coding quality and maximize financial recovery rates for healthcare facilities through efficiency, innovation, and compliance with international standards.
about.vision: To be the most trusted partner for every healthcare facility in the Kingdom on its journey toward digital transformation and excellence in health information management.
